contents:
**Task** `Entity`

馃攳 `transcription:domain:Task`
馃搧 architecture/domain/readme.qmd.md
- table: [[#tasks]]
- contains: [[#File]][]
- produces: ["[[#Transcript]]","[[#Summary]]"]
- task_statuses: | status | description |
|--------|-------------|
| created | Task created |
| scanning_durations | Detecting durations |
| pricing | Calculating the price |
| invoice_sent | Invoice sent |
| waiting_for_payment | Awaiting payment |
| paid | Paid |
| processing_files | Processing files |
| merging | Merging transcripts |
| generating_summary | Generating summary |
| ready | Ready |
| expired | Source files deleted |
| error | Error |
_comment: Hover on [[#Task]] in deep nested file shows Task entity info
